text: ...A week later.
Lord Scheat and I sit in the garden while eating snacks.
Having been thrilled by my story of the deserted island, his long barrage of questions have finally just stopped.

speaker: Scheat
text: A deserted island sounds wonderful. I would love to go to one too. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What’s stopping you? You can fly, right? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: But they do not even have beds, right?

speaker: Argo
text: That’s why it’s called “deserted”. We just piled up some leaves and slept on those. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Just hearing that makes my back hurt…

speaker: Argo
text: "I don't understand..." *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: But you did well, Argo. I am proud to be your master.

speaker: Argo
text: (My "master"? Since when did he become that…?)

speaker: Scheat
text: I never thought that someone as meek as you would end up saving a life. You have come a long way in the short time I have known you. *

speaker: Argo
text: It’s only been a few months... *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: That is just how fast you’ve grown. I commend you.

speaker: Argo
text: ...Thank you.
Amidst our idle conversation, the entrance to the garden suddenly flies open.
Just as I wonder who could enter Lord Scheat’s garden without even a knock, the answer to my question appears. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Yo! Hope you don’t mind bargain' in.

speaker: Argo
text: "Lord Baten!?"

speaker: Scheat
text: Geh! Baten...

speaker: Baten
text: "Geh"!? What's that supposed to mean, Lord Schithead!? *

speaker: Scheat
text: Ow ow ow! Stop! *

speaker: Lord Baten
text: Twists Lord Scheat's wings. Their playing around does nothing to detract from their impressiveness. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: My goodness. When did you arrive, Baten? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Just got here! They’re unloadin' the ship right now.

speaker: Baten
text: Oh, Argo. Had a rough time, huh? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-Yeah. But we managed to get through it… *sigh*
News of Theo and I returning safely already made it back to the ship. *sigh*
It seems Lord Baten and everyone else onboard were quite surprised to hear that we survived. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Well, sometimes you just gotta live off the sea! Wahahaha! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (I – It’s not that simple…)

speaker: Baten
text: But I gotta hand it to ya, Scheat. This country’s Knights College never fails to impress.

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm. I am quite proud of my country. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Oh, I know! What if I start goin' here too? I’m gonna be here for a while anyway. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: "Ridiculous! You have no business being a professor!"

speaker: Baten
text: I never said I was a professor! I could be a student! *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: That would be even worse!

speaker: Argo
text: "Don't worry, I’ll protect you." *sigh*

speaker: Unknown
text: You wouldn’t think they’d get along, but I’m surprised to see their relationship is actually pretty good.*

speaker: Baten
text: Argo, you shouldn’t be sittin' around here stuffin' yer face.

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? W-Why not? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Yer friends are back, remember? Ya better go see 'em.

speaker: Argo
text: Ah! You’re right!

speaker: Scheat
text: You may go, Argo. I am sure they are worried about you. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Okay! See you later!
